name: Solar Delineator with Warning Net
shortDescription: Solar-powered barricade delineator with warning net and 36-hour battery backup.
longDescription: A solar-charged LED delineator combined with a warning net barricade, marking excavation, roadwork or hazard zone perimeters and staying illuminated through the night on stored charge — IP67 rated for outdoor site use in all weather.

images.alt: Solar Delineator with Warning Net supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
